top_signals.title: Powell, Acceptance Remarks
top_signals.summary: Speech For the 2026 John F. Kennedy Profile in Courage Award, John F. Kennedy Library Foundation, Boston, Massachusetts
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Donald Trump and how strongman leaders fall
top_signals.summary: The downfalls of would-be autocrats in Hungary, Brazil and the Philippines hold lessons for America
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Op-Ed: The decoy effect — how Beijing steers western mining capital
top_signals.summary: By periodically rattling the sabre of export restrictions, Beijing deliberately keeps geopolitical anxieties at a boil, Nicholas Vafeas writes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: UK–Australia Investment Partnership Memorandum of Understanding
top_signals.summary: Australia and the United Kingdom have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to support greater investment between superannuation and pension funds in both countries.

top_signals.title: Reform panel calls for easing data center building standards
top_signals.summary: The panel's proposal urged the government to exclude lithium-ion batteries from the restrictions by introducing safety standards for batteries.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
